title: Author SessionEncumbranceState typed shape — running totals + derived pressure level
description:
Per [[substrate-sync-cost-pattern-2026-05-26]] Layer 5. Typed shape tracking the running TOTAL of accumulated cost across all encumbrance axes during a session, plus the derived `EncumbrancePressureLevel`. Proposed shape: `SessionEncumbranceState { sessionId, ceilingRef: LinkRefModel<SessionStaminaCeiling>, observedAt: ISO-8601, accumulatedContextTokens: Int, accumulatedWallClockSeconds: Int, accumulatedFinancialUSD: Double, perAxisPercentages: { context: Double, wallClock: Double, financial: Double, rateLimit: Double }, overallPressureLevel: EncumbrancePressureLevel /* see ordinality table bead */, contributingInvoices: [LinkRefModel<AbilityPerformanceInvoice>] }`. Emitted/updated after every cost-bearing invocation. Composes with `inference-account-schemas v0.2.0` ledger as data source.

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- InferenceUsageEvent (inference-account-schemas v0.2.0) — aggregates streams of these as contributingInvoices
- SessionStaminaCeiling (this cohort) — ceiling reference for percentage computations
